title: Paadatta Paadatta Lyrics Vanmham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Paadatta Paadatta
Singer(s): Velmurugan, Hariharasudhan
Music: Thaman.S
Lyricist: Yugabharathi
Movie: Vanmham (2014)

Paadatta Paadatta
paattu onnu paadattaa.
Podatta podatta
thaazham naanu podattaa.

Aadave vandhom ingae aadu thembaaga.
Koodiye nippom vaada naalum onnaaga.

Kaal nadandhu nadandhu poga
oru paadha varum neraa.
Nee kavala marandhu ponaa
nalla neram varum jora.
Yen vayasukeththa spouse-a thaedu
varmaba meeri rousa podendaa.

Paadatta Paadatta
paattu onnu paadattaa.
Podatta podatta
thaazham naanu podattaa.

Koduthaan illaama
kolam onnum varaadhey.
kolam nee ittukka ittuka
ennaikkum thappunu aagaadhey.

Paasam nee vachchaaley
baaramilla nogaadhey.
Venumey nambikka nambikka
ennaikkum poiyinnu pogaadhey.

Yaarayum anbaale
poththikolla venumthaaney.
eeramum paaraikulla undu machaaney.

Aayiram sondham onnaa
suththi ninnaalum.
natuputhaan kooda ninnu
kaakkum ennaalum

Kaal nadandhu nadandhu poga
oru paadha varum neraa.
Nee kavala marandhu ponaa
nalla neram varum jora.
Yen vayasukeththa spouse-a thaedu
varmaba meeri rousa podendaa.

Paadatta Paadatta
paattu onnu paadattaa.
Podatta podatta
thaazham naanu podattaa.

Oramaa nikkaadhey
oora nambi vazhaadhey.
anba nee ottikka ottikka
vambukkum thumbukkum anjaadhey.

Sogamey kollaadhey
kanneer sindha koodaadhey.
nattpa nee vachikka vachikka
ullaththil thunbnangal andaadhey.

Sooriyan vandhaaley
kooda varum veyil pole.
Tholviyum vettri tharum
vegam kondaaley.

Podhumey vazhkai endru
moottai kattaadhey.
venumey kaadhal ondru
neeyum thattaadhey.

Kaal nadandhu nadandhu poga
oru paadha varum neraa.
Nee kavala marandhu ponaa
nalla neram varum jora.
Yen vayasukeththa spouse-a thaedu
varmaba meeri rousa podendaa.

Paadatta Paadatta
paattu onnu paadattaa.
Podatta podatta
thaazham naanu podattaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Paadatta Paadatta'?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, encouraging listeners to enjoy life and dance.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vanmham'?

This song is featured in a lively scene that emphasizes togetherness and festivity among the characters.

Who are the singers of 'Paadatta Paadatta'?

The song is sung by Hariharasudhan and Velmurugan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Paadatta Paadatta' was composed by Thaman S.

When was 'Paadatta Paadatta' released?

The song was released on September 3, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vanmham, the song Paadatta Paadatta serves as a vibrant celebration of life and togetherness. The upbeat tempo and lively lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it perfect for festive occasions. The collaboration between Hariharasudhan and Velmurugan brings a unique energy that resonates with audiences. Overall, the song encapsulates the spirit of celebration, inviting everyone to join in the fun.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paadatta Paadatta from Vanmham is an electrifying duet that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With the dynamic vocals of Hariharasudhan and Velmurugan, paired with Thaman S's vibrant music, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the infectious energy and catchy beats that make this song a must-listen for any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: Sing, sing, I will sing a song. I will sing, I will sing, I will sing it out.
We have come here to dance. We will gather and dance together.
As time passes, a moment will come. If you forget your worries, good times will come. Don't let your spouse slip away from your age.
Without giving, no beauty will come. If you keep beauty, it won't go wrong for me.
If you keep love, there will be no burden. Don't let the need for trust turn into a lie.
Everyone needs love to survive. There is strength in the world, my friend.
Even if you are surrounded by a thousand troubles, I will protect you.
As time passes, a moment will come. If you forget your worries, good times will come. Don't let your spouse slip away from your age.
Don't stand still, don't trust the town. If you love, don't be afraid of the troubles.
Don't let sadness take over, don't let tears flow. If you keep love, there will be happiness inside.
When the sun rises, it will bring warmth like the sun. If you work hard, success will come quickly.
Life is not just about living. If you want love, don't let it slip away.
As time passes, a moment will come. If you forget your worries, good times will come. Don't let your spouse slip away from your age.
